skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120 seconds) from natural language requests. Handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
skill.summary: Professional AI video production agent for creating product ads, social content, brand videos, and explainers in minutes.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate AI video production API client. Static analyzer flagged 492 patterns across 11 files, but all are false positives. Shell command substitutions are standard scripting patterns for legitimate operations like timestamps and string processing. Network access targets the official pexo.ai API. Config file access (~/.pexo/config) stores user API credentials. Environment variables (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL) are required for API authentication. No malicious patterns, credential exfiltration, or code injection risks detected.

low_findings.title: API Key Storage in Config File
low_findings.description: API credentials stored in ~/.pexo/config file. This is standard practice for CLI tools but requires user awareness about file permissions.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file pattern is standard for CLI tools, but credentials are stored in plaintext without encryption.

low_findings.title: Network Requests to External API
low_findings.description: Skill makes HTTPS requests to pexo.ai API for video production. This is expected functionality but represents network exposure.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network calls are to the documented official API endpoint, authenticated with user-provided API key.

content.user_title: Create AI videos from text descriptions
content.value_statement: Transform text descriptions into professional short videos without video editing skills. Pexo handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically while you focus on your creative vision.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from natural language descriptions
Process image, video, and audio uploads as reference materials
Handle scriptwriting, shot composition, and transitions automatically
Provide preview options for user selection before final rendering
Support iterative revisions based on user feedback
limitations: Cannot crawl or access external web URLs for source materials
Video production requires 15-20 minutes for typical short videos
Requires valid Pexo API key and internet connectivity
Maximum video length is 120 seconds per production

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for online store products by uploading product photos and describing the desired style.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate engaging TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts content from simple text prompts.

use_cases.title: Brand Explainer Videos
use_cases.description: Produce professional explainer videos for services, features, or company introductions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second product video for my running shoes. Show them from multiple angles with dynamic lighting. Use the uploaded photo as reference.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner - First video creation with uploaded product image

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Ad
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a vertical 9:16 video for Instagram Stories promoting my coffee shop. Include shots of latte art, cozy seating, and friendly baristas. Upbeat background music.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - Specifying aspect ratio and style preferences

prompt_templates.title: Brand Story Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second brand story video showing our journey from startup to industry leader. Use a professional, inspiring tone with smooth transitions between scenes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - Complex narrative with specific emotional tone

prompt_templates.title: Product Comparison Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a side-by-side comparison video showing our product features versus competitors. Use clear visual distinctions and professional graphics for text overlays.
prompt_templates.scenario: Expert - Multi-element comparison with custom graphics

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second video showcasing my handmade jewelry collection with elegant transitions and soft background music.
output_examples.output: Video production initiated. Project ID: proj_abc123. Estimated completion: 15-20 minutes. You will receive preview options to select from before final rendering. Project link: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123

output_examples.input: Make a square format video for my restaurant menu featuring our signature dishes.
output_examples.output: Created 1:1 aspect ratio video project. Upload menu photos using pexo-upload.sh, then describe your vision. Pexo will compose shots with appetizing lighting and smooth transitions between dishes.

best_practices: Provide specific details about video style, mood, and target audience in your initial request
Upload high-quality reference images for better video output results
Review preview options carefully before selecting the final version for rendering
Allow 15-20 minutes for video production and avoid submitting duplicate requests
Use descriptive filenames when uploading assets to help Pexo understand content context
anti_patterns: Do not add duration, aspect ratio, or style details the user did not specify - Pexo handles these professionally
Never call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT polling phase - this triggers duplicate video production
Avoid truncating video URLs when sharing - always include full URL with all query parameters
Do not wrap URLs in markdown links as they may break on some platforms

faq.question: How long does it take to create a video?
faq.answer: A typical 15-second video takes 15-20 minutes to produce. Longer or more complex videos may take additional time. You can monitor progress through the project page link provided after submission.

faq.question: What file formats can I upload?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC. Maximum file sizes and additional restrictions may apply.

faq.question: Can I request changes after the video is created?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project_id and send revision requests via pexo-chat.sh with your specific feedback. Pexo will generate updated versions based on your input.

faq.question: What if the video production fails?
faq.answer: Check the project page for error details. Common issues include invalid API keys, unsupported file formats, or network connectivity. Run pexo-doctor.sh to diagnose environment issues.

faq.question: How do I get a Pexo API key?
faq.answer: Visit https://pexo.ai and log in to your account. Click your profile avatar, select API Keys, then Create Key. Copy the new key and add it to your ~/.pexo/config file.

faq.question: Can Pexo access videos from web URLs?
faq.answer: No. Pexo cannot crawl external websites. Download any web-hosted files to your local machine first, then upload them using pexo-upload.sh.
